text: A portion of the roadway which has been designated by striping, signing and pavement markings for the preferential or exclusive use of bicycles.
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 1
#### Article 1. Words & Phrases Defined
##### § 102-A — Bicycle lane

A portion of the roadway which has been designated by striping, signing and pavement markings for the preferential or exclusive use of bicycles.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*
